goal: Produce two bounded research documents without changing application code: a verified Tableau TWBX/PBIR/TMDL knowledge draft for C:/Proyectos/TableauToPBIP_V2 and a Linux node installation guide for the SWARMS parallel objective.

tasks.task: DO: Work in C:/Proyectos/TableauToPBIP_V2. Read AGENTS.md, Docs/PBIR_TMDL_VALIDATION_PLAYBOOK.md, Docs/audit_tableau_guide.md, core/tableau_parser.py, core/tom_engine.py, core/visual_creator.py, core/validation/validate_pbip_output.py, and inspect Demos/Sample Superstore Dashboard.twbx plus Demos/sample_-_superstore.xls. Create exactly one draft file: Docs/research/TWBX_PBIR_TMDL_AGENT_RESEARCH.md. Explain verified procedures for reading a TWBX/TWB, identifying the real workbook datasource and embedded files, reading XLS/XLSX metadata, reading PBIR definition.pbir/page.json/visual.json, reading TMDL model/table files, and connecting visual queryRef bindings to columns/measures. Include exact commands and observed caveats from this repository. Add an evidence table with source path, command, observed result, and confidence. Include a small self-improvement protocol: when a future agent finds an error, preserve the fixture/output, classify the failure, add a minimal regression test or correction note, and update the guide with date and evidence. DO NOT modify Python code, tests, Demos, .agent/skills, SWARMS, package configuration, or existing files. DO NOT invent Power BI Desktop validation; clearly label what was not verified. VERIFY: run git diff --check; validate the new Markdown exists and is non-empty; report the absolute path, byte size, and exact commands used. Return a concise evidence summary.

DO: Research and write exactly one file: C:/Proyectos/SWARMS/docs/research/linux-node-installation-guide.md. Read the SWARMS repository README.md, rust/README.md, CI workflow files, config/router documentation, and any existing Linux/VPN/node notes. Produce an actionable guide for installing and validating a Linux worker node for SWARMS: prerequisites, Rust/Python/uv setup, repository checkout, local router/provider configuration without secrets, systemd or supervised execution, health checks, offline mock validation, network/VPN assumptions, logs, rollback, and security boundaries. Distinguish verified repository facts from recommendations or items requiring user confirmation. Include exact commands only when supported by repository docs or local --help output. DO NOT touch C:/Proyectos/TableauToPBIP_V2, application code, secrets, provider accounts, global system configuration, or existing files. DO NOT claim a remote node was provisioned. VERIFY: run the repository's offline doctor/help checks if safe, run git diff --check in C:/Proyectos/SWARMS, validate the new Markdown exists and is non-empty, and report the absolute path, byte size, commands, and any blockers. Return a concise evidence summary.
